1.description: Search the service catalog for requestable items. Takes 2-4 keyword variations of the user's ask (service_catalogs) and returns matching catalog items (id, name, description, category) ranked by semantic relevance. Only items that carry an intake form are returned. Read-only — this is step 1 of a new service request; present the matches and let the user pick before fetching its fields.

parameters.name: service_catalogs
parameters.description: 2-4 keyword variations of the ask, e.g. ["VPN","remote access","VPN setup"].
